creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to basil from comment #0)

BTW, SAMBA4_BUNDLED_LDB is expected to be set to 'yes' or 'no'. As literally 'YES' doesn't match 'yes'(which is default anyhow), you got the given error.

So, please make up your mind - do you want to use bundled library(which is default anyhow) or want to use external library, in which case you need to set SAMBA4_BUNDLED_LDB=no.
